summary: Bank Withdrawal Feature for Merchants - Full Implementation Verified. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tested successfully showing Payout Settings with Mobile Money and Bank Transfer toggle, bank dropdown populated from BulkClix API, account verification flow, and save functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: BankTransferService class in bulkclix_service.py properly implements get_bank_list, verify_bank_account, send_to_bank methods
Public endpoint /api/public/banks correctly fetches bank list from BulkClix API (35 banks returned)
Merchant endpoints /api/merchants/banks/verify-account and /api/merchants/settings/bank-info handle authentication properly
MerchantDashboard.jsx Paiement tab shows complete payout settings with proper state management
Bank verification flow: select bank → enter account → verify → shows account holder name
preferred_payout_method field correctly toggles between 'momo' and 'bank'
seed_data_creation: Backend tests updated merchant bank settings (AFFINITY S&L, account: TEST1234567890, holder: TEST ACCOUNT HOLDER)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bank withdrawal feature fully implemented and tested. GET /api/public/banks returns 35+ banks from BulkClix. Merchant can select bank, verify account, and set preferred payout method (momo or bank). The payment system in payments.py checks preferred_payout_method and routes payouts accordingly.

GET /api/public/banks.response: 200 OK - Returns 35 banks from BulkClix (GCB, Ecobank, Fidelity, Absa, Stanbic, etc.)

POST /api/merchants/banks/verify-account.notes: Requires authentication, validates account_number and bank_id params

PUT /api/merchants/settings/bank-info.notes: Updates bank_name, bank_id, bank_account, bank_account_name, preferred_payout_method

GET /api/merchants/settings/payout-info.response: Returns momo and bank payout configuration with preferred_method

frontend_ui.payout_settings_page: PASS - Shows complete payout configuration UI
frontend_ui.preferred_method_toggle: PASS - Mobile Money and Bank Transfer buttons work
frontend_ui.account_number_input: PASS - User can enter bank account number
frontend_ui.verify_button: PASS - Appears when bank and account entered, triggers verification
frontend_ui.verification_display: PASS - Shows 'Account Verified' with account holder name
frontend_ui.save_button: PASS - 'Save Payout Settings' button enabled after verification

api_verification_results.GET /api/public/banks: 200 OK - 35 banks including GCB, Ecobank, Fidelity, Absa, Stanbic, Cal Bank, etc.
api_verification_results.POST /api/auth/merchant/login: 200 OK - Returns access_token and merchant data
api_verification_results.GET /api/merchants/me: 200 OK - Includes bank_name, bank_account, bank_id, bank_account_name, preferred_payout_method fields
